whyChooseUs.title: 100% Satisfaction Guarantee

cta.headline: Ready for a Spotless Home?
cta.subheadline: Book your first cleaning today and see the Dallas Shine difference.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of house cleaning services in Dallas, TX. From routine maintenance to deep cleans, our team delivers consistent, high-quality results.

services.title: Standard Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Regular upkeep to keep your home fresh and tidy.
services.longDescription: Our standard cleaning service covers all the essentials: dusting, vacuuming, mopping, kitchen and bathroom sanitation, and more. Perfect for weekly or bi-weekly maintenance.

process.title: Walkthrough
process.description: We review your priorities and note any special requests.

process.title: Detailed Cleaning
process.description: Our team follows a checklist to ensure every room is thoroughly cleaned.

process.title: Final Inspection
process.description: We do a quality check to make sure everything meets our standards.

faqs.question: How long does a standard clean take?
faqs.answer: Typically 1-2 hours depending on home size.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home?
faqs.answer: No, many clients provide a key or code. We're bonded and insured.

services.title: Deep Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Intensive clean for neglected areas and tough grime.
services.longDescription: Our deep cleaning goes beyond the surface. We tackle baseboards, blinds, inside cabinets, behind appliances, and more. Ideal for spring cleaning or moving in.

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We identify high-traffic areas and stubborn spots.

process.title: Deep Scrub
process.description: We use specialized tools and products to deep clean every surface.

process.title: Sanitization
process.description: All touchpoints are disinfected for a healthier home.

faqs.question: How often should I get a deep clean?
faqs.answer: Every 3-6 months is recommended, or before special events.

faqs.question: Does it include windows?
faqs.answer: Interior window sills and tracks are included; glass can be added.

services.title: Move-In/Move-Out Cleaning
services.longDescription: Make a great first impression or secure your deposit with our comprehensive move-in/move-out cleaning. We cover every corner so you can focus on the move.

process.title: Pre-Move Checklist
process.description: We confirm all areas to be cleaned, including storage spaces.

process.title: Full-Service Clean
process.description: Every room, closet, and surface is cleaned top to bottom.

process.title: Final Walkthrough
process.description: We ensure the property is move-in ready.

faqs.question: Do you clean inside closets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we clean all closets, shelves, and drawers.

faqs.question: Can I book last minute?
faqs.answer: Absolutely, we offer same-day and next-day service when available.

services.title: Post-Construction Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Remove dust and debris after renovation.
services.longDescription: After construction, your home needs a special clean. We remove fine dust, debris, and residue from every surface, leaving your space safe and beautiful.

process.title: Debris Removal
process.description: We clear large debris and vacuum thoroughly.

process.title: Detailed Dusting
process.description: We wipe down all surfaces, including light fixtures and baseboards.

process.title: Final Polish
process.description: Windows, mirrors, and floors are polished to a shine.

faqs.question: Is this safe for new floors?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use appropriate products for all floor types.

faqs.question: How long does it take?
faqs.answer: Depends on project size, but typically 3-6 hours for a standard home.

about.headline: Your Local Cleaning Experts in Dallas
about.mission: To provide exceptional, eco-friendly cleaning services that make your home a healthier, happier place.
story: Dallas Shine Clean was founded in 2015 by a team of cleaning professionals who saw a need for reliable, high-quality house cleaning in Dallas. Starting with just two cleaners, we grew through word-of-mouth by consistently exceeding expectations. Today, we serve hundreds of homes across the city, from Lakewood to Uptown.

Our commitment to eco-friendly practices and customer satisfaction has made us a trusted name in Dallas. We invest in our team with ongoing training and fair wages, ensuring every cleaner is motivated to deliver their best. We're proud to be part of the Dallas community and to help our clients enjoy cleaner, healthier homes.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We show up on time, do what we promise, and respect your home.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: We never cut corners. Every clean is thorough and detailed.

coreValues.title: Sustainability
coreValues.description: We choose green products to protect your family and the planet.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local businesses and give back to Dallas neighborhoods.

contact.headline: Let's Get Your Home Sparkling
contact.subheadline: Reach out today for a free, no-obligation quote.
